chunks.text:
# Enterprise ERP Business Glossary

## Sales & Customer Management

### Customer
**Definition**: An individual or organization that purchases goods or services from the company. Customers can be classified as retail (B2C) or business (B2B) with different credit terms and pricing structures.

**Attributes**: customer_id, customer_name, customer_type, credit_limit, payment_terms, tax_id, registration_date, status

**Related Concepts**: Sales Order, Invoice, Payment, Customer Address, Credit Score
... [TRUNCATED]

## Inventory & Warehousing

### Warehouse
**Definition**: A physical location where inventory is stored. Warehouses can be company-owned, third-party logistics (3PL) facilities, or virtual locations for transit inventory.

**Attributes**: warehouse_id, warehouse_name, warehouse_type, location_address, capacity_cubic_meters, manager_id, status

**Related Concepts**: Inventory Transaction, Bin Location, Warehouse Zone, Stock Transfer

### Inventory Transaction
**Definition**: A record of any movem... [TRUNCATED]

## Human Resources

### Employee
**Definition**: An individual who works for the company under an employment contract. Employees can be full-time, part-time, contract, or temporary with different compensation and benefit structures.

**Attributes**: employee_id, first_name, last_name, employee_type, department_id, position_id, hire_date, status, salary, manager_id

**Related Concepts**: Department, Position, Employee Compensation, Time Entry, Performance Review

### Department
**Definition**: An... [TRUNCATED]

## Quality & Compliance

### Quality Inspection
**Definition**: A systematic examination of materials or products to verify conformance to specifications. Inspections can be incoming (from suppliers), in-process (during production), or final (before shipping).

**Attributes**: inspection_id, inspection_type, reference_type, reference_id, product_id, inspection_date, inspector_id, result, defects_found, status

**Related Concepts**: Product, Supplier, Purchase Receipt, Work Order, Quality Standar... [TRUNCATED]

## Reporting & Analytics

### Key Performance Indicator (KPI)
**Definition**: A quantifiable metric used to evaluate performance against strategic objectives. KPIs can be financial, operational, customer-facing, or employee-related.

**Common KPIs**: Order fulfillment rate, Inventory turnover, Supplier on-time delivery, Customer satisfaction, Employee productivity, Production yield

### Financial Statement
**Definition**: Formal reports summarizing financial performance and position. Primary sta... [TRUNCATED]

triplets.object: planned (inter-warehouse transfers) or ad-hoc (emergency replenishment)

triplets.object: a recording of a financial transaction in double-entry bookkeeping

triplets.object: Money owed to the company by customers for goods or services delivered on credit

triplets.subject: Accounts Payable
triplets.object: Money owed by the company to suppliers for goods or services received on credit

entities_post_resolution.name: General Ledger Account
entities_post_resolution.definition: A general ledger account is a record of all financial transactions for a specific account type within a company's accounting system.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Definition: A chronological record of all financial transactions for a specific account type. | Definition: Money owed by the company to suppliers for goods or services received on credit. | Definition: Money owed to the company by customers for goods or services delivered on credit.

entities_post_resolution.name: Bin Location
entities_post_resolution.definition: A bin location is a designated storage position within a warehouse, organized into zones, aisles, shelves, and positions for inventory management.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Definition: A specific storage location within a warehouse. | Bin locations are organized into zones, aisles, shelves, and positions for efficient picking and put-away.

entities_post_resolution.name: Company Owned Third
entities_post_resolution.definition: Inventory Management is the business process of overseeing and controlling stock levels, locations, movements, and related transactions to ensure efficient storage, retrieval, and tracking of inventory assets.
synonyms: a chronological record of all financial transactions for a specific account type
a physical location where inventory is stored
a record of any movement or change in inventory quantity
a recording of a financial transaction in double-entry bookkeeping
a specific storage location within a warehouse
the movement of inventory between warehouses or locations

entities_post_resolution.name: Money Owed To
entities_post_resolution.definition: Accounts payable are amounts the company owes to suppliers for goods or services received on credit; accounts receivable are amounts owed to the company by customers for goods or services delivered on credit.
synonyms: Money owed by the company to suppliers for goods or services received on credit
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Definition: Money owed to the company by customers for goods or services delivered on credit. | Definition: Money owed by the company to suppliers for goods or services received on credit.

entities_post_resolution.name: Receipts Issues Transfers
entities_post_resolution.definition: Order status states such as draft, confirmed, shipped, or cancelled, indicating the current processing stage of a sales order.
synonyms: draft, confirmed, shipped, or cancelled status
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Transactions include receipts, issues, transfers, adjustments, and cycle counts. | Sales orders can be in draft, confirmed, shipped, or cancelled status.

entities_post_resolution.name: Types Quantities And
entities_post_resolution.definition: An overarching concept encompassing the specifications, pricing, and contractual details of products and services in a business context.
synonyms: finished goods, raw materials, or services
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: A commercial document issued by a seller to a buyer indicating types, quantities, and agreed prices for products or services. | Products can be finished goods, raw materials, or services with different pricing and inventory tracking requirements. | Contracts can be be fixed-price, cost-plus, or rate-based.

entities_post_resolution.name: Financial Plan That
entities_post_resolution.definition: Definition: A financial plan that allocates resources to departments, projects, or accounts for a specific period.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Definition: A financial plan that allocates resources to departments, projects, or accounts for a specific period.

entities_post_resolution.name: Budget
entities_post_resolution.definition: Definition: A financial plan that allocates resources to departments, projects, or accounts for a specific period.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Definition: A financial plan that allocates resources to departments, projects, or accounts for a specific period.

entities_post_resolution.name: Journal Entry
entities_post_resolution.definition: Definition: A recording of a financial transaction in double-entry bookkeeping.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Definition: A recording of a financial transaction in double-entry bookkeeping.

entities_post_resolution.name: Credit Rating And
entities_post_resolution.definition: Each supplier has a credit rating and payment terms.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Each supplier has a credit rating and payment terms.

entities_post_resolution.name: Approval Workflows
entities_post_resolution.definition: Purchase orders go through approval workflows before being sent to suppliers.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Purchase orders go through approval workflows before being sent to suppliers.

entities_post_resolution.name: Quality Delivery Performance
entities_post_resolution.definition: Suppliers are evaluated on quality, delivery performance, and cost.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Suppliers are evaluated on quality, delivery performance, and cost.

entities_post_resolution.name: B2C
entities_post_resolution.definition: Customers can be classified as retail (B2C) or business (B2B) with different credit terms and pricing structures.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Customers can be classified as retail (B2C) or business (B2B) with different credit terms and pricing structures.

entities_post_resolution.definition: Bin locations are organized into zones, aisles, shelves, and positions for efficient picking and put-away.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Bin locations are organized into zones, aisles, shelves, and positions for efficient picking and put-away.

tables_enriched.name: Customer Type
tables_enriched.description: This table stores information about different customer types, including their identifiers, names, descriptions, whether credit checks are required, and default payment terms.

tables_enriched.name: Customer
tables_enriched.description: This table stores detailed information about customers, including their identification, contact details, financial status, and industry classification, to support customer relationship management and ... [TRUNCATED]

tables_enriched.name: Customer Address
tables_enriched.description: This table stores address information associated with customers, including address details and default address status.

tables_enriched.name: Customer Contact
tables_enriched.description: This table stores contact information for customers, including primary contacts and their roles within the organization.

tables_enriched.name: Product Category
tables_enriched.description: This table stores information about product categories, including their identifiers, names, hierarchical relationships, descriptions, and creation timestamps.

tables_enriched.name: Product
tables_enriched.description: This table stores detailed information about products, including identifiers, categories, pricing, physical attributes, storage conditions, and status for inventory management.

tables_enriched.name: Price List
tables_enriched.description: This table stores information about different price lists used for product pricing, including their validity periods and current status.

tables_enriched.name: Product Price
tables_enriched.description: This table stores pricing information for products, including applicable discounts and effective dates for different price lists.

tables_enriched.name: Sales Order
tables_enriched.description: This table stores detailed information about customer sales orders, including order identifiers, dates, shipping, payment details, and status updates.

tables_enriched.name: Sales Order Line
tables_enriched.description: This table stores detailed information about individual items within sales orders, including quantities, pricing, discounts, taxes, and shipping dates.

tables_enriched.name: Invoice
tables_enriched.description: This table stores detailed information about invoices issued to customers, including amounts, dates, and payment status.

tables_enriched.name: Invoice Line
tables_enriched.description: This table stores detailed information about each line item on an invoice, including product details, quantities, pricing, and tax information.

tables_enriched.name: Payment
tables_enriched.description: This table stores records of payments made by customers, including details such as payment amount, method, date, and status.

tables_enriched.name: Supplier
tables_enriched.description: This table stores information about suppliers, including their identification details, contact information, performance ratings, and contractual terms.

tables_enriched.name: Supplier Address
tables_enriched.description: This table stores address information for suppliers, including location details and address type, to facilitate supplier contact and logistics management.

tables_enriched.name: Supplier Contact
tables_enriched.description: This table stores contact information for suppliers, including primary contacts and their roles within the supplier organization.

tables_enriched.name: Supplier Contract
tables_enriched.description: This table stores information about contracts with suppliers, including contract details, durations, payment terms, and status.

tables_enriched.name: Purchase Order
tables_enriched.description: This table stores information about purchase orders, including details about suppliers, order dates, delivery requirements, financial amounts, and approval status.

tables_enriched.name: Purchase Order Line
tables_enriched.description: This table stores detailed information about each line item within purchase orders, including product details, quantities, pricing, discounts, taxes, and delivery status.

tables_enriched.name: Purchase Receipt
tables_enriched.description: This table stores records of purchase receipts, including details about the receipt identification, associated purchase order, supplier, warehouse, receipt date, receiver, shipping carrier, tracking i... [TRUNCATED]

tables_enriched.name: Purchase Receipt Line
tables_enriched.description: This table records detailed information about each line item in purchase receipts, including product details, quantities, costs, and inspection requirements.

tables_enriched.name: Warehouse
tables_enriched.description: This table stores information about warehouse facilities, including their locations, capacities, types, and management details.

tables_enriched.name: Warehouse Zone
tables_enriched.description: This table stores information about different zones within warehouses, including their identifiers, names, types, and temperature control status.

tables_enriched.name: Bin Location
tables_enriched.description: This table stores information about the physical locations of storage bins within warehouses, including their identifiers, positions, capacities, and current status.

tables_enriched.name: Inventory On Hand
tables_enriched.description: This table stores data about the current inventory levels of products stored in various warehouses, including quantities, costs, and expiration information.

tables_enriched.name: Inventory Transaction
tables_enriched.description: This table records detailed information about inventory transactions, including movement types, quantities, costs, and references for tracking inventory changes across warehouses and bins.

tables_enriched.name: Stock Transfer
tables_enriched.description: This table records details of stock transfer transactions between warehouses, including transfer identifiers, dates, shipment methods, and statuses.

tables_enriched.name: Stock Transfer Line
tables_enriched.description: This table records individual line items for stock transfer transactions, including product details, source and destination bins, quantities involved, and transfer status.

tables_enriched.name: Production Line
tables_enriched.description: This table stores information about the various production lines used in manufacturing, including their identifiers, types, locations, capacities, setup times, and operational status.

tables_enriched.name: Bill of Materials
tables_enriched.description: This table stores the detailed composition of products, including their component parts, quantities, measurement units, and effective date ranges for manufacturing or assembly purposes.

tables_enriched.name: Work Order
tables_enriched.description: This table stores information about manufacturing work orders, including their identifiers, associated products, production lines, warehouse locations, quantities, key dates, status, priority, and cre... [TRUNCATED]

tables_enriched.name: Work Order Material
tables_enriched.description: This table stores information about the materials required and issued for specific work orders in the manufacturing or maintenance process.

tables_enriched.name: Production Schedule
tables_enriched.description: This table stores the scheduling information for production activities, including planned and actual start and end times, status, and priority of each production schedule entry.

tables_enriched.name: Quality Standard
tables_enriched.description: This table stores information about quality standards, including their identifiers, codes, names, types, versions, issue dates, statuses, and descriptions.

tables_enriched.name: Quality Inspection
tables_enriched.description: This table stores records of quality inspections performed on products, including inspection details, results, and related reference information.

tables_enriched.name: Non-Conformance Report
tables_enriched.description: This table stores records of non-conformance reports, detailing issues identified in products or processes, their causes, corrective and preventive actions, and resolution status.

tables_enriched.name: Account Type
tables_enriched.description: This table stores information about different types of accounts, including their identifiers, codes, names, and balance classifications.

tables_enriched.name: General Ledger Account
tables_enriched.description: This table stores information about general ledger accounts used in financial accounting, including account identifiers, types, hierarchy, currency, and status.

tables_enriched.name: Accounting Period
tables_enriched.description: This table stores information about accounting periods, including their identifiers, names, date ranges, fiscal years, and closure status.

tables_enriched.name: Journal Entry
tables_enriched.description: This table records financial journal entries, including details about the entry, associated documents, amounts, and approval status for accounting purposes.

tables_enriched.name: Journal Entry Line
tables_enriched.description: This table stores detailed line items for journal entries, including account details, debit and credit amounts, and references for financial transactions.

tables_enriched.name: Accounts Receivable
tables_enriched.description: This table stores information related to outstanding customer receivables, including invoice details, amounts owed, and collection activities.

tables_enriched.name: Accounts Payable
tables_enriched.description: This table stores records of amounts payable to suppliers, including invoice details, payment terms, and status updates for managing accounts payable processes.

tables_enriched.name: Budget
tables_enriched.description: This table stores financial budget data, including planned and actual amounts, for different departments and accounts within a fiscal year.

tables_enriched.name: Department
tables_enriched.description: This table stores information about organizational departments, including their identifiers, hierarchical relationships, management, budgeting, location, status, and creation timestamp.

tables_enriched.name: Position
tables_enriched.description: This table stores information about various job positions within the organization, including their codes, titles, salary ranges, and related departmental data.

tables_enriched.name: Employee
tables_enriched.description: This table stores detailed information about employees, including personal details, employment status, compensation, and organizational relationships.

tables_enriched.name: Time Entry
tables_enriched.description: This table records individual time entries logged by employees for various projects, including details about work hours, approval status, and timestamps for submission and approval.

tables_enriched.name: Carrier
tables_enriched.description: This table stores information about different carriers, including their contact details, service levels, and operational status.

tables_enriched.name: Shipping Route
tables_enriched.description: This table stores information about shipping routes, including origin and destination locations, distances, estimated travel times, carriers, service levels, costs, and status updates.

tables_enriched.name: Shipment
tables_enriched.description: This table stores information about shipments, including their identifiers, types, origin and destination locations, associated references, dates, carrier details, route information, tracking, costs, ... [TRUNCATED]

tables_enriched.name: Shipment Line Items
tables_enriched.description: This table stores detailed information about each line item within a shipment, including product details, quantities, and weights.

tables_enriched.name: Project
tables_enriched.description: This table stores information about various projects, including their identifiers, types, associated customers and managers, timelines, budgets, costs, status, priority, and descriptions.

tables_enriched.name: Project Task
tables_enriched.description: This table stores information about tasks associated with projects, including scheduling, status, and priority details.

tables_enriched.name: Application User
tables_enriched.description: This table stores information about users of the application, including their login details, account status, and associated roles such as employee, customer, or supplier.

tables_enriched.name: Role
tables_enriched.description: This table stores information about different roles within the organization, including their identifiers, codes, names, types, descriptions, statuses, and creation timestamps.

tables_enriched.name: User Role
tables_enriched.description: This table stores information about the roles assigned to users, including assignment dates, expiration, and current status.

tables_enriched.name: Audit Log
tables_enriched.description: This table records detailed logs of user actions and system events for auditing and tracking purposes.
